title: potentilla gracilis var. glabrata
intro: Potentilla gracilis var. glabrata is a deciduous perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae), and is also known as slender cinquefoil. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Potentilla gracilis var. glabrata include its potential to treat various ailments such as wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas, infusions, and salves, are made by steeping its leaves and stems in hot water or oil, and are used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
